Based on my visual inspection of the zoomed-in view, I can clearly identify the neighbour atoms of C:21 (atom index 21).

## Results

| 20 | C (Carbon) |

**Geomconf_index:** 317 (from the filename geomconf_317.xyz)

The carbon atom at index 21 is part of an aromatic ring structure and is bonded to:
- One hydrogen atom (H:36)
- Two carbon atoms (C:20 and C:22) which are part of the same benzene ring system

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 21, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
